subcodes.first_line: O pure-hearted master, what greater bounty than this, that thou didst become a partner in the tribulations of His Holiness the Exalted One and in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای استاد پاک نهاد چه نعمتی اعظم از این که در بلا شریک حضرت اعلی گردیدی و در
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
